creator: lytboris@gmail.com
text:
Update of curlftpfs from 0.9 to 0.9.1

Fix: PORTNAME=      curlftpfs
-PORTVERSION=   0.9
+PORTVERSION=   0.9.1
 CATEGORIES=    sysutils
 MASTER_SITES=  SF
 PKGNAMEPREFIX= fusefs-
@@ -22,6 +22,8 @@
 USE_GNOME=     glib20
 MAN1=          ${PORTNAME}.1
 PLIST_FILES=   bin/curlftpfs
+
+CONFIGURE_ARGS= --datarootdir=${PREFIX}

 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
